name: Equatorial Resources Limited
summary: Equatorial Resources Limited explores for and develops iron ore properties in the Republic of Congo. It owns an 80% interest in the Badondo iron project located in the northwest region of the Republic of Congo. The company has a strategic alliance agreement with Rock Mining SARL for the development of the Badondo iron project. Equatorial Resources Limited was incorporated in 1986 and is headquartered in Perth, Australia.
